title: Pack of – 6 Jumbo Hook Set Garage Storage | 140 X 130mm Large Hooks for Hanging | White Metal Ladder Hooks for Shed Organiser, Garage Storage, Garden Tools, Bikes, Ladders
features: MULTI-PURPOSE: These garage storage hooks are perfect for shed organisation and home storage; It is used for garage storage, garden tools, bicycles, ladders, hose and chairs

EASY INSTALLATION: This jumbo hook set comes with screws for easy installation; Make a mark where the screw's centre will go, drill the marked area and tighten the screw in the hole with a screwdriver
SPACE SAVER: You can save more space in the garage with storage hooks by fitting on wall studs, drywall, and other wall types neatly, leaving a lot of space for you on the ground

STRONG & DURABLE: These strong metal hooks come with plastic end pieces that are designed to hold the items firmly, protecting our ladder hooks from scratching while possessing good load-bearing properties
AESTHETIC DESIGN: The modern and sleek design of our white hooks for hanging helps to fit well with any decor and enhance the visual appeal of any place
